summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MetaBuilder AI App Builder platform. Backend APIs are fully functional (12/12 tests passed). Frontend core flows working including landing page, email authentication, dashboard, and templates. Some session management issues affecting extended workflows.

integration_issues.issue: Sessions expire quickly during testing, causing redirects to login mid-workflow

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with hero section and features
Dashboard displays user projects and navigation
Protected routes redirect unauthorized users to login
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Investigate session expiration timeout - may be too short for normal user workflows 2) Test Google OAuth integration flow 3) Verify project creation and builder interface work with stable authentication session
